overview: Telemedicine-based hormone replacement therapy clinic specializing in natural, bioidentical hormone optimization for men and women. Dr. Jacobson aims to restore hormone levels to peak ranges at ages 20-25 rather than merely treating symptoms.
highlights: Board-certified gynecologist with 30+ years of experience
targetAudience: Men and women experiencing age-related hormone loss and related symptoms including fatigue, sleep issues, low energy, and decreased libido.
